title: Better Panorama
description: Think of this mod as an easy way to create panoramas in Minecraft (compatible with versions 1.21.1)
body:
![Better Panorama MOD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1a50aaaa359d2be62cdb0571ff78894add35ff5_0.webp)

# ⭐ Better Panorama Mod :
Whether you're working on packs or mods, this tool lets you efficiently create your 6-panel panoramas, ready to copy and paste into your content wherever you need them.

⚠️[REQUIRED mod: Architectury API to function](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)

## ⚒️ How it works:
- Use the **F4** key to take your panorama.
- Use the **F9** key in-game to open the Panorama menu.

You can directly access the Panorama folder located at ``mods\panorama`` it’s that simple!

You can also configure the panorama capture resolution from 1K to 4K ULTRA, depending on your needs, allowing you to take perfect captures for your panoramas!
Think of this mod as a tool to assist resource pack creators in general, or simply as a handy tool depending on your needs.

# 💎 FEATURES :
- ✔️ **Easy to use**
- ✔️ **Simplified menu**
- ✔️ **Lang : FR / US**
- ✔️ **Compatible with the latest versions**
